name: The Fort Jennings State Bank
description_short: Community bank offering savings accounts, CDs, checking accounts, and competitive loan products with 41 consecutive quarters of 5-star ratings from BauerFinancial.
description_long: The Fort Jennings State Bank is a traditional community bank headquartered in Fort Jennings, Ohio, operating six physical branch locations with a long history of local banking services. The bank emphasizes financial stability, having received a 5-star rating from BauerFinancial for 41 consecutive quarters, indicating strength and reliability in the banking sector. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of deposit products including personal and business checking accounts, savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with terms ranging from 1 month to 60 months, money market accounts, IRAs, and safe deposit boxes. They also provide competitive loan products for mortgages, commercial loans, installment loans, and auto financing, though specific rates and terms require direct inquiry. The Fort Jennings State Bank differentiates itself through its consistent 5-star BauerFinancial rating spanning over a decade, demonstrating sustained financial strength and stability. The bank prioritizes customer security, actively warns customers about scam calls, and maintains a traditional community banking model with ATM access at all six locations and extended lobby and drive-thru hours including Saturday service. The primary caveat is that interest rates on most savings and checking products are extremely low (0.01-0.01% APY for standard accounts), with more competitive rates only appearing on specific CD terms and retirement accounts. The bank's communication emphasizes personal service and local relationships rather than digital-first features, making it most suitable for customers who value branch access and traditional banking services over online convenience.
services: Money Market Plus accounts (tiered by minimum balance)
ATM access at six branch locations (24/7)
pros: 41 consecutive quarters of 5-star BauerFinancial ratings, demonstrating sustained financial strength and stability
Six physical branch locations with ATM access at each location providing 24/7 account access
Extended banking hours including Saturday service (9:00 AM - 11:30 AM) and Friday evening access until 5:30 PM
FDIC member bank protecting deposits up to $250,000
Selective CDs with competitive rates (6-month CD at 3.71% APY, 24-month at 3.10% APY)
Retirement accounts with 2.03% quarterly APY on balances as low as $10 minimum
Multiple account types including IRAs, business accounts, Christmas Club accounts, and safe deposit boxes
cons: Passbook and regular savings accounts offer only 0.01% APY, significantly below market rates and below inflation
Standard checking accounts (NOW accounts) require $1,000-$2,500 minimum balance with only 0.01% APY
Most CD terms (12, 15, 30, 48, 60 months) offer only 0.10-0.25% APY, uncompetitive for long-term savings
Limited online banking presence and digital-first services compared to modern financial institutions
Requires minimum balance of $500-$5,000 for most CD products, limiting accessibility for small savers

contact.address: 120 N Water St, Fort Jennings, OH 45844

best_for: Community members in the Fort Jennings, Ohio area seeking traditional local banking with physical branch relationships
Customers prioritizing bank safety ratings and financial stability over maximum interest returns
Retirees and older depositors comfortable with branch-based banking who value in-person service and Saturday hours
Business owners needing commercial checking and loan products from a stable, locally-rooted institution
diagnosis: The Fort Jennings State Bank is best for rural and small-town customers in northwest Ohio who value proven financial stability, local relationships, and branch accessibility over competitive interest rates and digital convenience. The primary caveat is that deposit rates are significantly uncompetitive except for select CD and retirement products, making this bank unsuitable for rate-conscious savers seeking maximum returns on savings accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 120 N Water St, Fort Jennings, OH 45844
